homepage.title: JABLOTRON - recuperation | Jablotron
homepage.description: JABLOTRON is a manufacturer of innovative products for healthier and more comfortable living. A pleasant climate in your home regardless the season outside.
homepage.text_excerpt:
JABLOTRON - recuperation | Jablotron
JABLOTRON VENTILATION UNIT
Make your home healthier and more comfortable
Jablotron Futura ventilation unit is the lungs of your home. It provides you with a constant supply of fresh air into your home, while making efficient use of heat and reducing energy costs.
I'm interested in ventilation
True indoor comfort without over-drying
The device automatically ensures optimal humidity in your home.
Unrivalled lowest consumption even in freezing weather
Smooth operation even in severe frostwith no need of preheating.
CoolBreeze cooling and heating module
Significant cooling and dehumidification of the incoming fresh air.
Unique zone control
Truly individual ventilation, up to 16 independent zones.
What the Jablotron Futura energy recovery unit offers you
RECRUITMENT
The ventilation unit ensures natural ventilation of your new home
Controlled ventilation with heat recovery involves the continuous exchange of air from the inside for fresh and clean air from the outside. The supply air receives most of its heat from the extract air, is therefore thermally optimised and, thanks to the filtration used, is also free of dust, pollen and allergens. We offer recuperation units in two variants:
Futura L
- for family houses; optimal humidity and low consumption; CoolBreeze cooling/heating module option, zone regulation option
Futura S
- for apartments and smaller buildings; ceiling or wall installation, VarioBreeze™ zone regulation option
Controlled ventilation with heat recovery involves the continuous exchange of air from the inside for fresh and clean air from the outside. The supply air receives most of its heat from the extract air, is therefore thermally optimised and, thanks to the filtration used, is also free of dust, pollen and allergens. We offer recuperation units in two variants:
Futura L
- for family houses; optimal humidity and low consumption; CoolBreeze cooling/heating module option, zone regulation option
Futura S
- for apartments and smaller buildings; ceiling or wall installation, VarioBreeze™ zone regulation option
COOLBREEZE COOLING/HEATING MODULE
Experience real comfort all year round
The CoolBreeze module consists of a heat pump with the exchanger located in the ventilation system. It provides heating or cooling of freshly supplied air.

VarioBreeze™
Truly individual ventilation, up to 16 independent zones
Ventilate where and when you need to. Few people realise how significant the impact of true zone control can really be on many aspects of the operation of a heat recovery unit.
Reduction of the real consumption of the ventilation unit
Increasing the actual heat recovery efficiency to the technical maximum
Absolute noise minimisation
Significant improvement in relative humidity in the house
Significantly less filter wear
